title: Pandowirtin Lane
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Pandowirtin Lane''' was a street in [[Plawal Rift]], [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]]. [[Nubblyk]] owned an import/export business there that was later taken over by [[Bran Kemple]].

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}
*[[Children of the Jedi (abridged audiobook)|''Children of the Jedi'' abridged audiobook]]
